subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Hearken unto the Call of the One, the Single. Verily, He called thee aforetime with a Call whereby the sincere ones soared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محمد ان استمع ندآء الفرد الاحد انه ناداک من قبل بندآء به طار الموحدون
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @love of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
